summary: Top‑notch audience capture delivers an electrifying show highlighted by stellar versions of The Other One, Ship of Fools, Shakedown Street and Brent’s surprise verse.
review: Both reviewers rave about the performance, singling out The Other One, Ship of Fools, Shakedown Street and a memorable LLR as stand‑outs, with Brent Mydland even slipping in his own lyrical curveball.  The recording, despite picking up ambient dialogue that adds an immersive “you‑are‑there” vibe, is praised for its crystal‑clear, top‑notch sound quality throughout.

ai_rating.rationale: Consistently glowing 5‑star reviews emphasize an exceptional show and an excellent recording; the detailed praise gives strong confidence in a near‑perfect rating.

recording_quality.technical_notes: Ambient dialogue is captured, adding immersion, yet overall clarity, balance and fidelity are described as top‑notch throughout the set.

show_quality.setlist_flow: Reviewers note the show builds momentum, starting strong and getting even better as it progresses, delivering a consistently high‑energy performance.

band_member_comments.Keys: Brent Mydland adds a surprise verse mid‑song, providing a unique keyboard highlight.
